app_tagline: Move files between Google Drive and OneDrive. Free, open source, private.
home_heading: Move files between your cloud drives
home_sub: Connect both drives, pick what you want, we move the bytes. We never store your files or account info.
disclaimer_1: We do not store your files. They pass through our server in-memory only, then move directly to the destination drive.
disclaimer_2: We do not store your account information. Access tokens live in an encrypted session cookie on your browser and expire on logout.
disclaimer_3: We do not sell personal information. Ever.
disclaimer_4: This app is open source — you can read and audit every line.
transfer_insufficient_space: Selected files exceed the destination's free space. Deselect some files to proceed.
modal_conflict_title: Some files already exist at the destination
modal_conflict_body: How should we handle filenames that already exist in the destination folder?
modal_gdoc_body: Google Docs, Sheets, and Slides can't be copied natively to OneDrive. They'll be converted to Microsoft Office formats (.docx, .xlsx, .pptx).
auth_required: Please connect both drives to continue.
donate_body: If this tool saved you time, a small tip helps keep it free and maintained. Thank you.
